name: Small Travel Organizer Tan - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your cosmetics and toiletries neatly packed while travelling with this Small Travel Organizer from Brightroom™. Designed with a spacious main zippered compartment, this tan travel bag features a jewelry organizer with a belt to keep rings and has small notches to hold chains, studs and other trinkets. Plus, it comes with three zippered pouches to pack your cosmetics, toiletries and other essentials separately, and it has a top handle for easy portability.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
